ui.subtitle: Create a heartfelt supplication for yourself and your loved ones powered by Quran and authentic Hadith
ui.email_hint: Required, only used to send your du'a
ui.concerns_label: What would you like to pray for?
ui.concerns_placeholder: e.g., health, guidance, success in exams...
occ_desc.ramadan: the blessed last ten nights of Ramadan
occ_desc.illness: a time of illness — asking Allah for healing and ease
occ_desc.exams: a time of exams and studies — asking Allah for knowledge, understanding, and success
occ_desc.travel: an upcoming journey — asking Allah for safety and protection
occ_desc.newborn: the arrival of a new baby — asking Allah for blessings and protection
occ_desc.marriage: a marriage — asking Allah for love, mercy, and harmony
occ_desc.grief: a time of loss and grief — asking Allah for patience and comfort
occ_desc.hajj: the journey of Hajj or Umrah — asking Allah to accept the pilgrimage
occ_desc.gratitude: a moment of gratitude — thanking Allah for His blessings
occ_desc.general: everyday life — asking Allah for guidance, protection, and mercy
msg.no_content: No du'a content found to export.
msg.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
msg.add_member: Please add at least one family member with a name.
msg.ai_timeout: AI service timed out. Try fewer family members.
msg.ai_connect_error: Cannot connect to AI service. Check server internet.
msg.personal_msg_too_long: Personal message must be under 500 characters
msg.invalid_method: Method must be email, sms, or postcard
email.subheader: A heartfelt supplication for {name} and family
email.verify_note: Please verify all Quranic verses and Hadith references with authentic Islamic sources.
pdf.title: A Du'a for {name}

banner.jumuah: It's Jumu'ah — the Prophet ﷺ said there is an hour on Friday when du'a is accepted.
banner.ramadan: The blessed month of Ramadan — make du'a for your family during these precious nights.
banner.dhul_hijjah: The first 10 days of Dhul Hijjah — among the most beloved days to Allah for good deeds.
meta.title: MyDua.ai — Personalized Du'as for Every Occasion
meta.description: A du'a lives deep in your heart. We help it find its words — personalized supplications for every occasion, powered by Quran and authentic Hadith.
